attributes.action: Stop the removal of Sir Winston Churchill from £5 notes.
attributes.additional_details: We should be proud of our history/heritage. He was and will be our greatest ever PM whom without his brave decisions/leadership perhaps we would not freed Europe from Tryany!
attributes.background: Stop this happening.  The slow erosion of history!

rejection.details:
Bank notes are the responsibility of the Bank of England, which is independent of the Government and Parliament.

You can find out how the Bank decides who will be on bank notes here:
https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/banknotes/banknote-characters
